testcase.name: Login Navia
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] Running in HEADED mode.
Scenario: Login Navia &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/com/feature/DailyEightFortyTesting.feature:4&amp#27;[0m https://yopmail.com/ 2 &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Navigate to Navia&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_navigate_to_navia()&amp#27;[0m User Click login with client code &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click login with client code&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_click_login_with_client_code()&amp#27;[0m User Enter Client Code &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Enter Client Code&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_enter_client_code()&amp#27;[0m User Enter Password &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Enter Password&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_enter_password()&amp#27;[0m User Click Agree CheckBox &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Agree CheckBox&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_click_agree_check_box()&amp#27;[0m User Click Login button &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_click_login_button()&amp#27;[0m User Click Otp Verification and enter manualy &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Otp Verification and enter manualy&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_click_otp_verification_and_enter_manualy()&amp#27;[0m Login Page &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Login Again&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.Login_Page.user_click_login_again()&amp#27;[0m [SCREENSHOT] Saved: target\screenshots\Login_Navia_PASSED_20260427_162356_707.png [PASSED] Login Navia

Apr 27, 2026 4:22:26 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 27, 2026 4:22:26 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.102. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.14.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's. 735459

testcase.name: Payin - Withdraw Money from Navia
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Payin - Withdraw Money from Navia &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/com/feature/DailyEightFortyTesting.feature:26&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mNavigate to home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.ScreenShort.navigate_to_home_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[34mBank Deatails is displayed &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click The Withdraw button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_click_the_withdraw_button()&amp#27;[0m [SCREENSHOT] Saved: target\screenshots\Payin_-_Withdraw_Money_from_Navia_PASSED_20260427_162434_307.png [PASSED] Payin - Withdraw Money from Navia

testcase.name: Payin - Add Money to Navia via UPI
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Payin - Add Money to Navia via UPI &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/com/feature/DailyEightFortyTesting.feature:32&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mNavigate to home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.ScreenShort.navigate_to_home_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Add Money&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_click_add_money()&amp#27;[0m 2 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser enter money in amount to add&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_enter_money_in_amount_to_add()&amp#27;[0m 2 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Choose Pay Using UPI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_choose_pay_using_upi()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Enter UPI/ID/Mobile Number and click pay now&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_enter_upi_id_mobile_number_and_click_pay_now()&amp#27;[0m [SCREENSHOT] Saved: target\screenshots\Payin_-_Add_Money_to_Navia_via_UPI_PASSED_20260427_162522_747.png [PASSED] Payin - Add Money to Navia via UPI

testcase.name: User Check The Mutual Fund - UPI Payment - functionality
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User Check The Mutual Fund - UPI Payment - functionality &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/com/feature/DailyEightFortyTesting.feature:40&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mNavigate to home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.ScreenShort.navigate_to_home_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser MouseOver Dashboard and Click Mutual Funds&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.MutualFund.user_mouse_over_dashboard_and_click_mutual_funds()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Explore&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.MutualFund.user_click_explore()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Search &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Navi Flexi Cap Fund Direct Plan Growth"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m in Serach Box and enter&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.MutualFund.user_search_in_serach_box_and_enter(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click One Time , enter amount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"100"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and click pay now&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.MutualFund.user_click_one_time_enter_amount_and_click_pay_now(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click enter UPI ID &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"6374837965@ptsbi"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and Click Pay Via UPI&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.MutualFund.user_click_enter_upi_id_and_click_pay_via_upi(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m [SCREENSHOT] Saved: target\screenshots\User_Check_The_Mutual_Fund_-_UPI_Payment_-_functionality_PASSED_20260427_162620_957.png [PASSED] User Check The Mutual Fund - UPI Payment - functionality

testcase.name: Verify Charts - Nifty 50 Candle View
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify Charts - Nifty 50 Candle View &amp#27;[90m# src/test/java/com/feature/DailyEightFortyTesting.feature:50&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mNavigate to home page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.ScreenShort.navigate_to_home_page()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click the Watch List&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_click_the_watch_list()&amp#27;[0m S&P BSE SENSEX &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Select scrip &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"S&P BSE SENSEX"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_select_scrip(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click Watch List Again&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_click_watch_list_again()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser mouse over the scrip &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Nifty 50"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_mouse_over_the_scrip(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Click the Candles Icon&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_click_the_candles_icon()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Choose Candle &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"candle"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_choose_candle(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m Feed Connection Value of One Minute : 24110.20 Feed Connection Value of One Minute : 24110.20 Feed Connection Value of One Minute : 26043.00 Feed Connection Value of One Minute : 26043.00 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser Check the one Minute and one Day Chart&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.stepdefinition.PreMarkets.user_check_the_one_minute_and_one_day_chart()&amp#27;[0m [SCREENSHOT] Saved: target\screenshots\Verify_Charts_-_Nifty_50_Candle_View_PASSED_20260427_162710_599.png [PASSED] Verify Charts - Nifty 50 Candle View
